# Hallow's End
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Hallow%27s%20End&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Hallow's End
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = u
| desc = A light rustle in the amber sea... Thanks to: Nekrie.

| rof = 66
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 14
| lifetime = 570
| minDmg = 205
| maxDmg = 255
| feedp = 400
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes

| lootbag = white
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude>
